{{Infobox concept
| name = Copper stage
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Upon reaching the [[Copper stage]] of the [[sacred arts]], one's spirit opens.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Copper]] souls can process [[vital aura]] to provide a supply of [[madra]] that is more expansive and effective.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Copper]] is a stage of advancement for practitioners.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
